title: Player Unknown's Battlegrounds: PUBG
description: PUBG is a battle royale shooter where 100 players fight to be the last one standing on a massive island filled with weapons and vehicles.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: An open-world action-adventure RPG set in Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour, and body modification.

title: Grand Theft Auto V
description: Experience the sprawling world of Los Santos and Blaine County in this critically acclaimed open-world crime epic.

title: Apex Legends
description: A free-to-play hero shooter where legendary competitors battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier.

title: Counter-Strike 2
description: The legendary competitive FPS returns with enhanced graphics, refined gameplay, and new features on the Source 2 engine.

title: Valorant
description: A 5v5 character-based tactical shooter where precise gunplay meets unique agent abilities in intense competitive matches.

title: Fortnite
description: The popular battle royale game featuring building mechanics, creative modes, and constant updates with new content.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: Play as Geralt of Rivia in this award-winning open-world RPG filled with rich storytelling and challenging monster hunts.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: An epic tale of life in America's unforgiving heartland, featuring a vast and atmospheric world.

title: Minecraft
description: The iconic sandbox game where you can build, explore, and survive in procedurally generated worlds.

title: League of Legends
description: A competitive team-based strategy game where two teams of powerful champions face off to destroy each other's base.

title: Dota 2
description: A multiplayer online battle arena where every hero has unique abilities and playstyles in strategic team battles.

title: Overwatch 2
description: A free-to-play team-based action game featuring a diverse cast of heroes with unique abilities.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III
description: The latest installment in the iconic FPS franchise with intense multiplayer combat and thrilling campaigns.

title: Elden Ring
description: A fantasy action-RPG adventure set in a world full of mystery and peril, created by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin.

title: Hogwarts Legacy
description: Experience life as a student at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry in the 1800s.

title: God of War
description: Kratos and his son Atreus embark on an epic journey through Norse mythology in this critically acclaimed adventure.

title: Palworld
description: A multiplayer open-world survival crafting game where you can befriend and collect mysterious creatures called Pals.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
description: A story-rich RPG based on Dungeons & Dragons, featuring turn-based combat and cooperative gameplay.

title: Destiny 2
description: A free-to-play online-only multiplayer first-person shooter with RPG elements and cooperative missions.

title: Rust
description: The only aim in Rust is to survive - overcome struggles such as hunger, thirst and cold in this brutal multiplayer game.

title: ARK: Survival Evolved
description: Stranded on a mysterious island, you must learn to survive by taming dinosaurs and crafting technology.

title: Rainbow Six Siege
description: A tactical shooter emphasizing environmental destruction and cooperation between players.

title: Warframe
description: A free-to-play cooperative third-person shooter with fast-paced action and deep customization.

title: Terraria
description: A 2D sandbox adventure where you dig, fight, explore, and build in a procedurally generated world.

title: Dead by Daylight
description: A multiplayer horror game where one player takes on the role of a savage Killer and four others play as Survivors.

title: Stardew Valley
description: You've inherited your grandfather's old farm plot. Armed with hand-me-down tools, you set out to begin your new life.

title: Among Us
description: A multiplayer game of teamwork and betrayal where crewmates work together while impostors lurk among them.

title: Rocket League
description: A high-powered hybrid of arcade-style soccer and vehicular mayhem with easy-to-understand controls.

title: The Last of Us Part I
description: Experience the emotional story of Joel and Ellie in a brutal post-pandemic world, rebuilt for PC.

title: Fall Guys
description: A massively multiplayer party game with up to 60 players online in a chaotic obstacle course royale.

title: Hades
description: Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash your way out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler.

title: Sea of Thieves
description: A shared-world pirate adventure where you sail the seas, hunt for treasure, and battle other pirates.

title: Dark Souls III
description: The latest chapter in the series with its trademark sword and sorcery combat and rewarding action RPG gameplay.

title: Spider-Man Remastered
description: Swing through Marvel's New York as Spider-Man in this critically acclaimed action-adventure.

title: Horizon Zero Dawn
description: Experience Aloy's journey to unravel the mysteries of a world ruled by deadly machines.

title: Monster Hunter: World
description: Hunt massive monsters in a living, breathing ecosystem where you can use the environment to your advantage.

title: Resident Evil Village
description: Experience survival horror like never before in this sequel to the acclaimed Resident Evil 7.

title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
description: Explore late 1500s Sengoku Japan as you come face-to-face with larger than life foes in this action-adventure.

title: Final Fantasy XIV
description: A massively multiplayer online role-playing game with an epic story, diverse classes, and stunning worlds.

title: It Takes Two
description: Embark on a co-op adventure where you're forced to work together through a magical world.

title: Satisfactory
description: A first-person factory building game with a dash of exploration and combat.

title: Hitman 3
description: Experience the dramatic conclusion to the World of Assassination trilogy as Agent 47.

title: Subnautica
description: Dive into a vast underwater world filled with wonder and peril in this survival adventure.

title: Phasmophobia
description: A co-op psychological horror game where you and your team investigate paranormal activity.

title: Doom Eternal
description: Hell's armies have invaded Earth. Become the Slayer in this fast-paced demon-slaying FPS.

title: No Man's Sky
description: Explore infinite procedurally generated universes in this space exploration and survival game.

title: Halo: The Master Chief Collection
description: The iconic Halo series comes to PC with remastered campaigns and classic multiplayer.

title: Age of Empires IV
description: Build mighty civilizations and lead them to victory in this real-time strategy game.

title: FIFA 24
description: Experience the most authentic football game with HyperMotionV technology and over 19,000 players.
